title: R1 Video Reviewer Panel
summary: A role-based reviewer system that improved a personal-agent promo across craft, platform fit, business clarity, accessibility, and audio identity.
outcome: V19 reached a 9.1/10 average reviewer score, unanimous reviewer preference, and full export QA pass.

title: Labs Site Build
summary: A standalone GitHub Pages lab that separates structured project documentation from the polished Squarespace marketing site.
outcome: Published a JSON-driven project library with search, filters, reusable entry templates, Git history, GitHub Pages hosting, and Squarespace DNS.

title: Main Street Schertz Field Guide Generator
summary: A playful local-first generator that turns Main Street Schertz outings into structured field-note cards.
outcome: Published a JSON-backed mini-tool with sample observations, filters, a draft form, and reusable output for future local content.
